confirm-email.title: Confirm your email
confirm-email.body: Thank you for registering! Please confirm your email address by clicking the button below.
confirm-email.linkText: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:

reset-password.title: Reset your password
reset-password.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to proceed.
reset-password.linkText: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
reset-password.farewell: If you did not request a password reset, please ignore this email. Best regards, The Team

invite-email.title: You have been invited to join CRM
invite-email.body: You have been invited to join {{company}} on CRM. Click the button below to set up your account.
invite-email.linkText: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste the following link into your browser:
invite-email.farewell: We look forward to having you on board! Best regards, The Team
